name: Big Adventure: Trip to Europe 4 - Collector's Edition
short_description: Explore Europe on an exciting journey! 15 countries, ancient castles, scenic parks and mysterious museums await you. Find hidden objects, solve puzzles and collect unique souvenirs. Discover the magic of the Old World!
detailed_description:
European Journey of Your Dreams

Embark on an unforgettable journey through Europe's most amazing corners! This exciting game offers you the unique opportunity to visit 30 incredible locations across 15 different countries without leaving your home.

Your route takes you through majestic national parks, inspiring museums with world masterpieces, and ancient castles holding centuries-old secrets. Each new location is a chance to immerse yourself in different cultures, enjoy architectural masterpieces, and discover hidden gems of the Old World.

Explore and Discover

You'll encounter challenging hidden object scenes that will require all your attention, and clever mini-games that will test your logic and wit. Pack your bags and get ready for adventure - a real European tour awaits you!

Collector's Edition Features

For true travelers, we've prepared a special edition with exclusive content:

• 8 additional locations to explore
• 12 bonus mini-games to improve your skills
• Convenient music player with beautiful soundtracks
• Collection of exclusive desktop wallpapers
• Virtual souvenir collection to remember your journey

Discover the magic of the Old World and become a true expert on European countries!

After visiting all countries and completing the souvenir collection, you'll participate in a special ceremony where you'll receive the "True Europe Connoisseur" title. You'll get a special European traveler diploma and access to a private gallery with exclusive materials about European culture and landmarks.
